name: Ramen Foo Yung
directions: Open ramen package and remove seasoning packet, it will be retained for later.
Boil noodles until soft, and drain.
In a separate fry pan melt butter or margarine on medium-high heat. once melted and bubbling, add seasoning packet and stir.
Then add the drained noodles and fry them for several minutes, stirring and turning them as you go.
The noodles will start to separate from the clump as they get done.  they will be slightly turning golden brown.
In a separate bowl, scramble the two eggs.
When noodles are slightly browned, add the eggs and stir thoroughly.
Reduce heat to medium-low immediately.
Flip and let the top cook.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Super Easy Egg Flower Soup
directions: bring stock to a boil then simmer.
slowly stir in beaten egg until soup thickens.
add salt pepper according to taste.
serve hot.

name: The All-Purpose College Condiment
directions: Combine all ingredients in bowl and stir to combine (I like to use a whip).
Refrigerate until serving.

name: Delicious Knockout Sleep-aid
directions: Empty hot chocolate envelope into a large mug.
Add Cherry Brandy and mix together.
Add boiling water to fill the mug.
Stir and enjoy your sleep.

similar.name: Milk and Honey Soup - Cat Cora

name: Fat Free Vegetable Dip
directions: Mix sour cream and ranch dressing and chill!
Serve with any vegetables.

similar.name: Very Fattening, but Very Yummy Dried Beef Dip

name: Jezebel Jam
directions: Mix well and store in refrigerator.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups.

similar.name: Johnny Jalapeno's Sweet Heat Appetizers (Or Wraps)

name: Poached Cusk
directions: Heat water in a shallow saucepan.
Add S& P.
Add cusk pieces.
Poach until fork tender and cooked through about 3-5 minutes.
Serve with drawn butter.

name: Grandma Drew's Potato Salad Dressing
directions: In saucepan, mix all dry ingredients together.
While stirring with whisk, gradually add water, vinegar and beaten egg.
Heat on medium heat, stirring constantly, until sauce thickens to the consistency of mayonnaise.
Refrigerate up to 1 week.
NOTE: When making Potato Salad, I use 3 parts Grandma's sauce and 1 part mayonnaise.

name: Blue Cheese Dip
directions: Throw everything in a bowl and mix!

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing for the Blue Cheese Dressing Snobs

name: Herbal Vinegar
directions: Put herbs, vinegar, and salt in a blender and blend on high speed about 30 seconds.
Strain through a fine strainer.
If you want a very clear vinegar, you can filter it through rinsed and squeezed-dry coffee filters.
However, you will be filtering out flavor.
Press on the solids to extract all the vinegar and flavor.
Herb flowers may be added directly to the vinegar after it is strained if desired.
Vinegar is best used immediately when it is fresh, and delicate in color.
The color will oxidized very fast to a brownish color.
The flavor is stable, however.
Store in a cool, dark place, tightly covered with a nonmetallic lid.

similar.name: Vinegar Hot Sauce for Pulled Pork

name: Breading Mix for Frying - Low-Carb (Atkins) Version
directions: ***Note: This is enough to coat 6-8 chicken tenders.
In a bowl, mix Dipping Sauce ingredients.
Dry meat with paper towels.
Place meat to be breaded (chicken breasts, chicken strips, pork chops, etc.) in the bowl and turn to coat well.
In plastic bag, add all dry ingredients.
Add half of meat to bag and shake to coat.
Repeat with other half of meat.
Fry in hot oil till browned on the outside and done on the inside.
Time will vary according to the meat/seafood being cooked.
Drain on paper towels.

name: Unsweetened Spiced Vinegar
directions: Tie the spices in a spice bag or piece of cheesecloth.
Place vinegar and spice bag in non-reactive (stainless steel) pot.
Bring to a boil and cook about 10 minutes.
Cool.
Store vinegar and spice bag in air-tight plastic or glass container.
NOTE:*** Although the flavor intensifies with aging, the vinegar is ready to use immediately.
After about 1 month, remove the bag from the vinegar.
***SWEETENED SPICED VINEGAR: To sweeten this recipe, add 3 1/2 cups granulated sugar.
Good for pickled beets or pickled peaches.

name: Browned Buttered Egg Noodles
directions: Boil water for noodles, cook noodles according to directions on package.
While noodles are draining, melt butter in a small frying pan.
Keep stirring until butter starts to foam and brown (watch carefully, don't burn).
Add noodles to a casserole dish, pour browned butter over noodles; mix to coat.
Serve; salt and pepper to taste.

name: Thai Style Spinach Soup
directions: Heat the vegetable broth until it begins simmering, then add the green onion, garlic, and tofu.
Let simmer for 5 minutes, then add the spinach leaves and simmer another 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and simmer an additional 5 minutes, season to taste with salt and pepper (and a tiny bit Tabasco, if you like) then serve immediately.

Note: regarding the 1 to 2 cups tofu- it depends on how"chunky" you want your soup or how many people you're feeding; you can also add a bit more vegetable broth, but not more than an additional 1/2 to 3/4 cup or you'll dilute the coconut milk too much.
Also, you can make this a non-vegetarian soup by substituting tofu with cubed cooked chicken.

similar.name: Korean Spicy Clam Soup With Noodles
Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Homemade Mayonnaise
directions: Serving size is 1 tablespoon.  Recipe makes 1-1/4 cups mayonnaise.
Wash the outside of the egg shell with soap and water.
Rinse and dry.
In blender, add egg, dry mustard, vinegar, (optional paprika) and 1/4 cup oil.
Turn on low for 1-2 minutes.
Turn blender off, and scrape sides if necessary.
Turn blender on, and while it is running, slowly add the remaining 3/4 cups oil.
Blend until the consistency of mayonnaise.
Refrigerate in non-reactive container.
FOR VARIATION: Add 1/4-1/2 tsp of your desired seasoning, such as, basil, tarragon, or parsley.

name: 12 minute pasta
directions: cook pasta in boiling, salted water until all dente.
drain.
heat oil in large pan until warm.

add crumbs, stirring constantly for 2 minutes season to taste with salt and pepper remove from heat add pasta to pan return to heat add prosciutto and parmesan and toss until mixture is heated through garnish with parsley.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Beer Batter for Tempura
directions: Mix dry ingredients in bowl.
Add beer a little at a time until desired thickness (about the thickness of pancake batter).
Add any spice you would like at this point (hot sauce or Cajun season or lemon juice, garlic powder or crushed).
Place what you are frying on a cookie sheet (at least 1/4-inch deep) lined with wax paper.
Pour mixture over food and chill for one hour.
Remove when ready to fry and drop one at a time in hot oil until golden brown.

name: Baked 'caught' Fish
directions: Melt butter in baking pan at 350.
Mix flour, cornmeal, onion salt,& pepper.
Dredge fillets in flour mixture.
Place in pan, turning once to coat both sides with butter.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Bake 10 minute.

name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives
directions: Cook the fettucini in boiling salted water over medium high heat until al dente (about 10 minutes).
Toss the fettucini with the olive oil.
Add the tomatoes, olives and Italian seasoning and toss.
Top with parmesan cheese.

name: Onion Seasoning Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients together until just blended.
The mix can be used immediately or made in advance and stored in individual foil packets for up to 6 months.

name: Peppered Cheese Crisps
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cut each pita into 6 wedges.
Separate each wedge into 2 pieces.
In a small bowl, stir rest of the ingredients together.
Spread mixture evenly on wedges.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until edges are browned.

name: Toasty Cheese Ravioli
directions: Slightly under-cook ravioli in boiling water and drain.
In a large skillet, heat butter and let brown slightly.
Add ravioli.
Saute until brown.
Mix breadcrumbs with rosemary and add to skillet to coat ravioli.
Serve with favorite dipping sauce.

name: Gel Air Fresheners
directions: Heat 1 cup of the liquid potpourri almost to a boil (Note: the concentrated type retains its smell more effectively).
Stir in 1 package of the gelatin at a time, completely mixing after each addition.
When all packets have been stirred in, add the 2nd cup of liquid potpourri.
Pour into decorative containers, cover, and put in the fridge until set.
WARNING: Your fridge will smell like the potpourri, so make sure there are no foods in the fridge that will be adversely affected.
These can be put in small baby food jars that you decorate, or you can put it in new, small 1/2 pint decorative jelly jars.
Put a piece of eyelet lace (or comparable breathable fabric) on the top and screw down the ring; if giving as a gift, I would put the canning lid on, then the lace and ring.
These can be decorated as you like, and complementary paste food coloring added to intensify the color; for example: blue for blueberry muffin, red for cinnamon spice.

name: Super Easy Ritz Cracker Breading
directions: Crush Ritz crackers.
Mix in pepper.
Dip food item of choice into egg then into Ritz cracker mix.
Fry in 350°F oil until done.

similar.name: Breading Mix for Frying - Low-Carb (Atkins) Version

name: Peanut Butter, Butter & Honey Spread
directions: Combine ingredients, mix well.
Store in refridgerator.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Margarita Guacamole
directions: Combine avocado and lime juice, stirring to coat.
Mash mixture with a fork (mixture will still be slightly lumpy).
Add tequila and remaining ingredients, stirring until well blended.
Serve with tortilla chips.

name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)
directions: Heat to boiling a quart of water in a large sauce pan.
Cook noodles until al dente.
Drain water and immediately return noodles to sauce pan.
Add beef and gravy, using a fork to break up chucks.
Add sour cream, frozen peas, and salt and pepper.
Mix until thoroughly combined.
Serve immediately.
Leftovers of this stuff are gross, so try to eat as much as you can that very night.

similar.name: Very Fattening, but Very Yummy Dried Beef Dip

name: Seasoned Breadcrumb Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl until blended.
Place mix in a 1-quart container with tight fighting lid.
Label and store in a cool, dry place.
Use within 6 months.
Please note: In order to"dry" the bread, I cut it into 1 inch cubes, place it in the oven at 325 degrees until toasted.

name: Tomato on Toast
directions: Put slices of tomato to fill top of toasted english muffin (butter toast if you wish).
Sprinkle tomato with bleu cheese and dash of Italian seasoning (or your own favorite seasoning).
Microwave about 40 seconds or until bleu cheese just begins to melt.

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese

name: Yum Yum Yogurt
directions: Thaw fruit if frozen.
Mix fruit thoroughly with yogurt.
Add splenda, mix thoroughly.
Sprinkle with optional cereals for an extra crunch.

similar.name: Low Carb Sweetened Condensed Milk Substitute

name: Lemon Pepper Pasta
directions: Cook pasta following directions on package.
While pasta is cooking, melt butter.
Drain pasta well when it is finished cooking.
Put pasta in a serving bowl and pour butter over it.
Sprinkle with lemon pepper.
Toss to coat and serve hot.
You can add more or less lemon pepper, try 1 tsp at first and add more according to your taste.
You can always add more but it's hard to get it out once you have dumped it all in there.

name: Cure for Nausea
directions: Mix ingredients and pour over crushed ice.
Take one tsp every fifteen minutes.

similar.name: Old Fashioned Remedy for Chest Colds

name: Spiedino - Spiedies - Speedies Marinade for Chicken
directions: Whirl all ingredients in the blender.
Chill until needed for marinating.

name: Dump Soup
directions: Open cans and pour together into pot.
Heat over stove.

similar.name: Crock Pot Split Pea and Ham Hock Soup

name: Creamy Tomato Sauce for Pasta
directions: Heat olive oil over medium heat.
Sauté crushed garlic for 1-2 minutes.
Stir in tomato sauce.
Add salt, pepper, and pesto.
Add cream cheese and stir or whisk well until fully melted.
Stir parmesan cheese until melted.
Add cream and stir well.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Potted Prawns
directions: Cut prawns into small pieces.
Melt butter in a large sauté pan and when foam subsides, add prawns and mace, nutmeg, cayenne, mixed spices and pepper.
Toss in butter for a few minutes.
Spoon into four small ramekin pots or dishes.
Press lightly, and cover with melted butter.  If necessary, melt a little additional butter and spoon over tops of prawns.
Cover each pot with a round piece of aluminium foil and chill in the refrigerator.
Serve with hot toast, crackers or triangles of pita bread that has been warmed in the oven.
Chef's Notes: Chopped crab or lobster meat may be prepared in the same way.  Potted prawns may be kept in the refrigerator for up to one week.

similar.name: Healthy Spicy Shrimp and Scallop Skewers
George Foreman's Shrimp Al Mojo De Ajo

name: Cornbread Croutons
directions: Preheat oven to 450º.  Place cornbread cubes in large bowl and drizzle melted butter over all.  Stir lightly but thoroughly so that all cubes are buttered.
Spread evenly on a baking sheet.  Toast in the oven for 7-10 minutes, turning once,  or until cubes are browned the way you like them.
Serve warm or cooled on salads, chilis, and soups.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Sardine Pate
directions: Drain the sardines and place them in a bowl with the lemon rind and lemon juice and mash with a fork until the sardine mixture is a smooth consistency.

Before adding the yoghurt and cottage cheese to the sardines, examine both to determine whether they tend to be watery. (Yoghurts and cottage cheese differ so much in this respect). If necessary, first drain the yoghurt and/or cottage cheese in a sieve lined with a filter coffee liner; then mix the yoghurt and cottage cheese with the sardines; and fold in the cucumber and basil.
Season to taste with the garlic salt and the freshly ground black pepper.
Place the sardine paté in 4 ramekins, garnish with the cucumber twists and parsley sprigs.
Serve with crispbreads, pita bread or crusty rolls.

Chef's Notes: An obvious variation would be to make just ONE dish of the paté - and serve it only to those who like sardines!  Garlic lovers could, of course, use fresh garlic instead of garlic powder.  And if you don't like basil, use chives or spring onions.  A quick and easy way to include additional flavours is, of course, to use a cottage cheese with chives or garden vegetables.

name: Cherry Tomato Salad
directions: In a medium bowl whisk together balsamic vinegar, olive oil, coarse salt, ground pepper and sugar or sugar substitute. Add grape tomatoes cut in half, red onion and parsley.
Toss to combine.
Serve cold.

similar.name: HEIRLOOM TOMATO SALAD WITH NECTARINES, AVOCADO AND ARUGULA
Easy Cucumber Salad W/ Red Wine Vinaigrette

name: Parmesan Popcorn
directions: Pop popcorn as package directs.
Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine butter, onion powder and garlic powder.
Place over medium heat til butter is melted.
As soon as popcorn is done, transfer to a large bowl.
Drizzle seasoned butter over popcorn and toss evenly to coat.
Immediately sprinkle on parmesan cheese and toss til mixed and melted.

name: Mini Taco Cups Appetizers
directions: Heat toaster oven to broil.
In small bowl, combine sour cream and taco seasoning.
Place 1 tsp chili in each taco cup (I used tostitos scoops).
Top with 1/2 tsp cheese.
Place in toaster oven and broil 1-2 minutes.
Top with sour cream.

similar.name: Johnny Jalapeno's Sweet Heat Appetizers (Or Wraps)

name: Quick Homemade Mustard
directions: Beat and refridgerate.

name: Bird Cakes
directions: In a large pan start melting the fat.
When almost melted, take off the heat, add the rest of the listed ingredients and mix well.
Let the mix cool enough for the seeds to be evenly distributed and not sink to the bottom.
Fill your molds, cool until set and un-mold.
IMPORTANT: Do not use old and used fat from your deep fryer because that is not good for the birds.

similar.name: Linda's Fantabulous Food Processor Pie Crust

name: Tartar Sauce Again
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Place in frig to blend flavor ahead if possible.
Stored well overnight.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Italian Parmesan Herb Mix
directions: Stir together all the ingredients.  Package mixture in airtight containers and store in in a cool place or in the refrigerator.

similar.name: Flavored Butter: Garlic and Parsley Butter

name: Chicken Coating Mix
directions: Place all ingredients in a Ziploc bag and shake well to combine.
Store in a cool dry place and use within 6 mos.

NOTE: When ready to use, simply grab some boneless skinless chicken breasts, dip them, one at a time into either water, melted butter, milk, or beaten egg; then place the dipped chicken one at a time into the baggie and shake to coat; then bake the chicken on an ungreased cookie sheet in a 350°F oven for 1 hour or until chicken is 170° or their juices run clear.

name: Blue Cheese Vodka Balls (Finger Food)
directions: Cream together the blue cheese, cream cheese, vodka and parsley until smooth.
Refrigerate for 35 minutes.
Shape into small balls and then roll into the sesame seeds.
Refrigerate until needed.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing for the Blue Cheese Dressing Snobs

name: Zippy Chicken Soup
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
Cook and stir for 5 minutes or until cheese melts.
Serve with crusty bread or tortilla chips.

similar.name: Crock Pot Split Pea and Ham Hock Soup

name: Chicken, Pear, and Blue Cheese Salad
directions: In a large bowl combine everything but the pears and toss gently to coat. Divide onto four plates or bowls.
Arrange pear slices on top. If desired, sprinkle with pepper.

similar.name: Sweet and Tangy Balsamic Salad (With Honey Roasted Peanuts)

name: Chutney-Chicken Salad
directions: In a large bowl combine the chutney, mayonnaise dressing, and currey powder. Add chicken, grapes, and toasted almonds; toss gently to coat.
Serve chicken mixture on lettuce leaves. If desired, garnish with cherries.

name: Cold Pizza Pinwheels
directions: Mix together all ingredients except for tortilla shells.
Spread mixture over tortilla shells.
Roll tortillas up and chill.
Before serving, cut into bite-sized portions.

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese
Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)
Spicy Spinach Burritos -- Don't Knock It 'til Ya Try It!!!

name: Delicious Coating Mix for Chicken
directions: In a large resealable bag combine the oil with all remaining ingredients; seal the bag and shake vigorously.
Remove half or more of the mixture for another time and store tightly sealed in the refrigerator.
Add in desired amount of chicken pieces; shake to coat.
Place on a greased baking sheet in a 425 oven for 45 minutes.

name: The Easiest Pea Salad in the World
directions: Chop up onion.
Throw everthing in a big bowl.
Stir till combined.
Season with salt and pepper to your taste.
Chill and enjoy!

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese

name: Play Doh
directions: Place in saucepan.
Cook over moderate heat for 5 minutes.
Store in plastic bag in fridge.

name: Feta Stuffed Tomatoes
directions: Prepare tomatoes.
Crush crackers and mix with Feta cheese and Italian Seasoning(amount you use depends on amount of tomatoes).
Stuff Tomatoes.
Sprinkle tops with crushed French Fried Onions.
Pour Melted butter on top.
Bake in oven at 350 for approx 10 minutes until top starts to brown.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives
HEIRLOOM TOMATO SALAD WITH NECTARINES, AVOCADO AND ARUGULA

name: Blue Cheese, Beet & Bacon Salad
directions: Layer lettuce (or spinach), beets, cheese, onion, and bacon on serving platter.
Drizzle with dressing and toss with croutons.

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese
Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)

name: Easy Clam Cakes
directions: Mix clams, eggs, crushed crackers, parsley, and grated onion.
In pan in hot butter, spoon clam mixture into 4 mounds, gently flattening each with back of spoon.
Cook cakes until browned on both sides, about 3-5 minutes per side.
Serve with tartar sauce and lemon wedges, if desired.

name: Hawaiian-Style  Brine
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Place turkey in large dish or containter and pour brine over.
Cover and allow to brine for 24-48 hours.
For a good size chicken, half the recipe and half the brining time.

name: Clear Lip Glaze
directions: melt almond oil and beeswax in saucepan over low heat until soft.
remove it from the heat.
add honey and peppermint oil and blend thoroughly.
stir mixture sometimes when cooling to avoid separation.

name: Beetroot, Lemon and Ginger Marmalade
directions: Peel and coarsely grate the beetroot.
transfer to a medium sized bowl.
add remaining ingredients and mix well.
transfer to tightly capped jar.
refridgerate for up to 3 weeks.
serve cold with any savory dish.

name: Old Fashioned Remedy for Chest Colds
directions: put ingredients into a glass.
fill with hot water.
drink.
hop into hot bath.
then straight into bed.
sweat it out.

name: Amaretto Fruit Dip
ingredients: vanilla flavor instant pudding and pie filling mix
directions: Mix cool whip with dry pudding mix and amaretto.
Refrigerate 2 hours or more.  Serve with cut up fruit.

name: Curry Stuffed Eggs (Curried Deviled Eggs)
directions: Hard-boil and peel the eggs, then slice in half length-ways.
Remove the yolks with a teaspoon, place them in a bowl with the mayonnaise, curry paste and lemon juice, then mash to a smooth consistency.
Spoon neat blobs of the mixture into the hollows in the egg-halves, then arrange on a serving plate.
Try not to eat them all before the guests arrive!  :-).

name: Michael's Hors D'oeuvres
directions: Spread pesto on rounds.
Stack the 5 tomatoes and cut into 4 strips vertically.
Top each round with a thin tomato strip, place on tray, garnish with an edible flower, if available, and serve.

name: Easy Garlic-Parmesan Butter
directions: Mix the butter spread with a spoon first to make sure it has a creamy consistency.
Add in the Garlic Salt (add more or less to your liking).
Add in grated Parmesan cheese(add more or less to your liking).
Stir ingredients together and serve.
Refrigerate the left-overs(if you have any)!

similar.name: Flavored Butter: Garlic and Parsley Butter

name: Barley Soup With Rice
directions: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
Bring to boil; reduce heat and simmer until rice is cooked.

name: Dilly Beer Dip
directions: Mix together cheese and dill dip.
Stir in cheddar cheese.
Add beer until desired consistancy and flavor is reached. (I usually use 1/2 of a can.).
Chill to thicken. (I usually make this the night before a party to let it thicken.).

similar.name: Very Fattening, but Very Yummy Dried Beef Dip

name: Dixie Stampede Homestyle Cream of Vegetable Soup - Authentic
directions: In a 3-quart sauce pot, melt margarine. Add onion, garlic, and corn syrup. Simmer 1 minute. Do NOT brown.
Add flour, white pepper, salt, chicken broth, water, and vegetables. Simmer 3 minutes.
Add half-and-half. Simmer until desired consistency. Stir constantly - do NOT bring to boil.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve.

similar.name: Milk and Honey Soup - Cat Cora

name: Easy Bath Salts
directions: Mix Everything in a bowl.  Break up clumps with a fork.  If you use a favorite type of bath salt for the texture then it has a scent if not, you can add any type of purfume you want.
Now place into a container, and there ya go!

name: Pepper's Clam Dip
directions: Mix everything together including some clam juice to thin the mixture to desired consistency.
Serve with potato chips!
This recipe is from http://chrisgreytak.com/peppers_clam_dip.htm.

name: Honey, the Cat's Dipped the Nip Again ( Catnip Tea )
directions: Place the warm water in a container with a tight-fitting lid.
Add the catnip and chicken broth.
Shake vigorously for a couple minutes or until the bouillon is dissolved and the catnip has given the tea a greenish tinge.
Serve ¼ cup of the tea to your cat in a shallow bowl.
Store the remainder in the refrigerator. Warm before serving.

similar.name: Milk and Honey Soup - Cat Cora

name: Canadian Cheese Soup
directions: Melt the butter in a stockpot or Dutch oven over medium low heat.
Add the carrots, onions and celery all at once and sauté until tender.
Add flour and stir until flour is blended into the butter.
Cook until mixture begins to turn a light brown color (a light roux).
Increase heat to medium-high and add the chicken broth a little at a time.
Continue to cook and stir with a whisk until a thick base if formed.
Add half and half, being careful not to let it boil.
Add cheese, stirring until cubes are melted.
If too thick, add more half-and-half or some milk to thin.
Just before serving add parsley.
Garnish with the jalapeno pepper slices or roasted red bell pepper slices.

similar.name: Milk and Honey Soup - Cat Cora

name: Duxelle With Ham
directions: In a skillet, heat ham with butter over a moderate fire.
Saute for a few minutes, then add onion, shallots, and saute one more minute.
Add mushrooms and thyme and let cook until most of the moisture is gone.
Then add white wine and mix together.
Season to taste.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer
Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)
Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Ww Tasty Fiesta Dip
directions: Mix Hidden Valley Mix into sour cream.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before eating.

similar.name: Very Fattening, but Very Yummy Dried Beef Dip

name: Piggy's Delight
directions: Cream cheese with a mixer.
Add garlic salt.
Add milk, add more if needed to make it a creamy consistency.
Hollow out one loaf of bread and put dip into it.  Rip up the other loaf for additional dipping.
Store in refrigerator.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Hot Clam Appetizer
directions: Mix together all ingredients and put in a small baking dish.
Bake 375 degrees until hot and golden brown.

similar.name: Korean Spicy Clam Soup With Noodles

name: Comforting Garlic Soup
directions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan or pot and saute the garlic until hot.
Add vegetable stock or water, season with salt and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then turn heat down and let it simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Add the beaten egg white while stirring.
Put one slice of bread in each bowl and ladle soup onto it to serve.
Enjoy and keep your health!

name: Scallop Appetizer
directions: Cut scallops into fourths, unless small
then leave whole.
Simmer 4-5 min in salted water.
Drain and place in in jar while hot with the french dressing and garlic.
Marinate and chill for several hours.
Serve with toothpicks as an unusual appetizer.

similar.name: Healthy Spicy Shrimp and Scallop Skewers

name: Ramen Stew
directions: Bring water to a boil in a saucepan.
Add ketchup.
Add Ramen, and boil for 2 minutes.
Tear bread into small pieces and add to saucepan.  Stir until bread is virtually dissolved.  Mixture will thicken as bread dissolves.
Add cheese in small pieces.  Continue heating and stir until cheese is thoroughly melted and mixed.
Remove from heat, and add Ramen Flavor Packet.
Stir thoroughly and serve in a bowl.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Salmon With Pesto Crust
directions: Preheat your oven to 400.
Line a baking sheet with foil and coat lightly with cooking spray.
Season filets with salt and pepper and place on baking sheet.
Cook in oven for about 7-8 minutes.
Place oven to Broil setting and remove salmon.
Carefully top salmon with Pesto, nice and thick.
Place baking sheet under broiler (about 6 inches away).
Bake until the pesto is lightly browned and be careful - the olive oil in the Pesto jumps about!
Plate up and enjoy!

name: Linda's Kidney Bean Dip With Crackers
directions: Mix garlic, onion, horseradish, dry mustard, sour cream, and relish in a bowl, and refrigerate 6-24 hours.
Drain beans, and add to mixture. Chill.
Serve with assorted crackers.  Great with bagel or pita chips too.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)
Very Fattening, but Very Yummy Dried Beef Dip

name: Linda's Veggie and Cream Cheese Stuffed Celery
directions: Wash, and cut the celery. Dry celery stalks with a paper towel (IMPORTANT).
Cut into 3" pieces, and set aside.
Put cream cheeses into a glass bowl. Put in microwave for 45 secs., until soft.
Add milk and cream together.  Start with 1 T. and add more, if needed to make a creamy texture.
Add Vegetable Soup dip mix, and mix well.
Stuff celery with cream cheese mixture.
Put in a plastic container or on a serving plate, wrap, and put in refrigerator for at least 1 hours.
Serve.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Tortellini Pepperoni Salad
directions: Cook tortellini according to package directions.  Rinse under cold water; drain well.
In large bowl, combine cooked tortellini, cheese, pepperoni, red pepper, and dressing; toss gently.
Serve over bed of salad greens.

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese

name: Thin Steak and Cheese
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Season the steaks.
Put about 1 tablespoon of cheese on one end.
Roll the steak up and place in baking pan.
Continue with the last two steps until all steaks are in pan.
Bake in oven for about 10 minutes.
Then its done.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)
Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Feeds an Army Salad
directions: Combine all ingredients for the salad.
Combine all ingredients for the dressing.
Put dressing on salad right before serving.

name: Lite Fettuccine Alfredo
directions: Cook pasta as instructed on package.
Combine broth, milk and flour in medium saucepan.
Stir in cream cheese, boullion cube, parmesan cheese, ground pepper, nutmeg, and garlic powder.
Cook two minutes, stirring constantly using a whisk until alfredo thickens.
Toss with cooked fettuccine pasta or pasta of your choice.
Top with fresh parsely and additional parmesan cheese, if desired.

name: Balsamic Mushrooms
directions: Heat oil in skillet over med-hi heat.
Add mushrooms and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Stir in vinegar, salt & red-pepper flakes, and season with pepper.  Cook 1 minute more.
Transfer to a bowl and serve!

name: Easy Diabetic Teriyaki Marinade
directions: Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
Pour over meat, fish, tofu or vegetables and let sit at least 8 hours.

similar.name: Spiedino - Spiedies - Speedies Marinade for Chicken

name: Breading Mix
directions: Mix it all together! I usually save an old bread crumbs canister and just fill it with all the ingredients, then shake thoroughly to mix.

For perfect, moist pork chops with gravy, pound them thin, press mixture into both sides of (dry) chop, then fry in a preheated pan with oil until golden brown.  Remove chops and add a couple cups of water to the pan. Deglaze pan and stir until it boils. Add chops and simmer for five minutes.  If mixture doesn't thicken enough, or you want to make it more flavorful, add more of the mix directly to the water and stir constantly with whisk.
This breading can be used on pork, chicken, or beef. It results in a moist and delicious meal every time.

name: Shrimp Linguine
directions: Cook linguine, drain, and set aside.
Melt butter in a 10-inch skillet.
Add garlic, shrimp, and mushrooms and cook slowly in hot butter for 5 minutes.
Add linguine to skillet.
Sprinkle with cheese, salt and pepper.
Toss linguine until very hot but do not let butter brown;
Sprinkle with more cheese and garnish with parsley.

name: Maple Balsamic Dressing
directions: In a blender, combine vinegar & syrup.
While processing, gradually add oil in a steady stream.
For pork chops:.
Pour 2/3 cup of dressing into a large resealable bag; add pork.
Seal bag. marinade 30 minute
Drain chops. Grill chops covered, over medium heat for 6-7 minute per side. Brush with 3 Tbls. reserved dressing during last 5 minute Drizzle remaining dressing over chops before serving.
Salad:.
Toss salad with dressing, serve immediately.
Strawberries:.
In a large bowl, toss berries with dressing.Chill.

name: Baby Shrimp Scampi and Angel Hair Pasta (Rachael Ray)
directions: Get your pasta water going.
Start the scampi sauce when you drop your pasta into boiling water to cook.
Heat a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add extra-virgin olive oil and melt the
butter into it.
Add shallots and cook a minute or 2, stirring constantly.
Add lemon zest and shrimp and heat shrimp through, another minute or two.
Add vermouth or wine and tomatoes. Toss another minute to heat the tomatoes through.
Add cooked pasta to the pan and toss to coat evenly in sauce and to distribute the shrimp.
Season liberally with salt and pepper and serve with chives to garnish.

name: Milano Shrimp Fettuccini
ingredients: tomatoes seasoned with basil garlic & oregano
directions: Sauté shrimp and garlic in olive oil until shrimp are pink.
Stir in tomatoes, and simmer for 5 minutes.
Blend in cream and green onions, heat through.
DO NOT boil.
Serve over hot cooked pasta.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Easy Cucumber Salad W/ Red Wine Vinaigrette
directions: Combine all ingredients in a flat tupperware container and mix well.  Chill for 1 hour or longer before serving.  Also you can use the leftover marinade for another helping!

similar.name: HEIRLOOM TOMATO SALAD WITH NECTARINES, AVOCADO AND ARUGULA

name: Killians Beer Mustard
directions: Crack the mustard seeds in a coffee or spice grinder. (Do not make into a powder)
Stir in enought vinegar to make a thick paste.
Combine mustard powder with the salt, stir in enough beer to make a thick paste.
Mix the two pastes together and add enough beer to make a smooth pasty consistency.
Can store up to 3 weeks in refriderator in a sealed container.

name: Sweet Fennel Paste
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender until almost smooth.
Store this one in the fridge.

name: Sweet Curry Paste
directions: Combine all ingredients and whisk well.

name: Middle Eastern Orange Paste
directions: Comebine all ingredients and mix well with a whisk. Store in fridge.

name: Asian Spice Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Store in a sealed container.

name: Light Linguine Carbonara
directions: Cook linguine according to directions.
Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, combine the next 5 ingredients.
Cook and stir over medium-low heat until mixture reaches 160 degrees and coats the back of a metal spoon.
Stir in 1/4 cup of the parmesan cheese, the peas and the bacon; heat through.
Drain linguine; toss with sauce.
Sprinkle with the remaining parmesan cheese.
Serve immediately.

name: George Foreman's Shrimp Al Mojo De Ajo
directions: Heat the Foreman Grill to its hottest setting.
Take huge shrimps (prawns) and butterfly.
Mix the garlic, butter, and lemon.
Salt and pepper to taste.
Rub all on the fleshy side of the shrimp.
flesh side up.
Grill until the butter rolls off.  It may be less than 5 minutes.
Test the flesh for tenderness.
Serve.

name: Low-Fat Creamy Cucumbers
directions: Peel cucumbers and slice in half lengthwise.
With a small spoon, scrape out seeds and slice cucumbers about 1/4 inch thick slices.
In bowl combine sour cream, apple cider vinegar, Splenda, chives, salt, and pepper.
Mix until well blended.
Add cucumbers and stir till well coated.
Store in refrigerator until ready to serve.

similar.name: Easy Cucumber Salad W/ Red Wine Vinaigrette

name: Easy Rainbow Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions.
Combine cooked pasta, ham, cheese and red onion in a large bowl.
Pour Italian dressing over and gently stir until all ingredients are well coated.

similar.name: Spinach Pasta Salad - Taste of Home
Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese

name: Easy Broiled Scallops
directions: Preheat oven for broiling.
Melt butter, add olive oil, lemon juice and seasonings.
Add scallops, stir to coat.
Place in broiler, I use a small cake pan.
Broil for 3 to 4 minutes, stir and cook for 3 to 4 minutes more or until done.
Depending on size of scallops, may take a little longer, mine were dime sized.
You may sprinkle a little Parmesan after you take out for a little different taste.
Serve hot, maybe with some crusty bread for dipping.

similar.name: Healthy Spicy Shrimp and Scallop Skewers

name: Derek's Bruschetta Bread
directions: Mix 1/2 of the oil with the crushed garlic and spread onto bread lightly, toast in broiler until lightly browned but not crispy.
Mix the remainder of the oil, chopped tomatoes, spices and vinegar.
Spread on toasted bread and top with cheese.
Place under broiler until cheese is melted.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Buffalo Blue Cheese Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Chill.
Serve.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing for the Blue Cheese Dressing Snobs

name: Black Olive Appetizers
directions: Cut thin slice off bottom of each olive, forming a flat base.
Roll up slice of pepperoni and place inside pitted end of each olive.
Fill center of each pepperoni slice with desired combination of cheese, vegetables and herbs.
Stand olives on serving plate.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Creamy Shrimp and Peas
directions: Rinse frozen shrimp under cold running water to remove ice.
Heat shrimp, soup and peas to boiling.
Boil and stir 5 minutes.
Stir in cheese spread and sherry, cook, stirring until the cheese is melted.
Serve in patty shells.

similar.name: Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)
The Easiest Pea Salad in the World

name: Milk and Honey Soup - Cat Cora
directions: Place the milk in a medium saucepan and bring to a simmer over medium heat. Adjust the heat as necessary to keep the milk at a simmer, and prevent the mixture from boiling over, until it has reduced by half. Whisk from time to time to keep a skin from forming along the top surface.
Meanwhile, slice the cheese into pieces just smaller than the slices of toast. Top each piece of toast with a slice of cheese and set aside.

Once the milk has reduced, whisk in the honey and add the salt. Ladle the soup into individual serving bowls. Float two pieces of toast with cheese on the top of each portion of soup. Garnish with the chives and serve immediately.

name: Parmesan-Crusted Salmon
directions: Cover the bottom of a sauté pan with the olive oil and heat to medium-high heat.
Combine parmesan cheese and Italian seasoning on a plate.
Dredge salmon fillets in cheese mixture and place in hot pan.
Cook for approximately 3 minutes on each side!

name: Tortellini in Tomato Broth
directions: Combine broth, water and tomatoes in a large saucepan.  Bring to a boil.
Add tortellini; cook uncovered for 5 minutes.
Add spinach, basil and pepper until warmed through.
Ladle into bowls.  Top with 2 teaspoons Parmesan cheese.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Arugula, Apple, & Goat Cheese Salad
directions: Put the arugula, apple, and crumbled goat cheese together in a serving bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil, vinegar, and season with salt and pepper.

similar.name: HEIRLOOM TOMATO SALAD WITH NECTARINES, AVOCADO AND ARUGULA

name: Lawry's Whipped Cream Horseradish
directions: Whip cream until stiff peaks form.
Fold in seasoned salt, horseradish and Tabasco until well mixed.
Make sure to use either the prepared horseradish or the freshly grated horseradish but not both.

name: Orange and Almond Couscous
directions: Toast nuts in the bottom of a medium saucepan over medium heat. Transfer to a dish and reserve.
Return pot to stovetop. Add broth and oil, cover pot and bring to a boil.
Remove pot, add couscous, zest and parsley then stir. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
Fluff couscous with a fork and toss with almonds.

name: Gingerbread Play Dough
directions: Put dry ingredients in a pot and mix well.
Add water, oil, and food coloring. (red and green food coloring will give the dough a darker brown color).
Cook 3-5 minutes over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and pulling away from the side of the
Dump dough onto lightly floured surface and knead to desired consistency. Careful, it will be a little hot.
Store in an airtight container.
Notes: I like the less salty feel of the dough when only adding a 1/4 salt but then it should really be stored in the fridge.
A half cup of salt will prevent the dough from molding and will allow you to store it at room temperature. Plus you can also dry and keep your dough creations.

name: Special Sauce
directions: Combine ingredients and put them in the dispensing bottle.
Keep refrigerated.

name: Very Fattening, but Very Yummy Dried Beef Dip
directions: Add ingredients in a large bowl and mix.
Refrigerate before serving.
Serve with Ridge potato chips.
Use leftovers to serve over baked potatoes.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Crock Pot Split Pea and Ham Hock Soup
directions: Put ham, peas, vegetables, seasonings and stock powder in the pot.
Pour the can of chopped tomatoes and the water over it all.
Cover and cook on high for 4-5 hours, on low for 6-7.
Remove the ham bones and the bay leaf.
We serve this with lemon wedges: lemon juice on pea soup is delicious.

similar.name: Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)

name: Tangy Caesar Salad
directions: Mix salad dressing, lemon juice & black pepper.
Place romaine in 6-8 salad bowls.
Top with dressing, parmesan cheese & croutons.

similar.name: Easy Cucumber Salad W/ Red Wine Vinaigrette
Sweet and Tangy Balsamic Salad (With Honey Roasted Peanuts)

name: Mediterranean Couscous
directions: Combine all ingredients EXCEPT couscous in a pot.  Bring to a boil uncovered.
Remove from heat and immediately stir in couscous.  Let stand 5 minutes, covered.
Fluff with a fork **Important** or it turns to a brick!
Can be served hot or chill to make a wonderful salad.

name: Tip: No Egg Wash Tip
directions: Make your pie, I made an apple pie.
I had just put on the top crust and was thinking well here goes another wasted egg yolk, (Actually, I don't waste it I feed it to the dog), to egg wash the top.
I like the glazey look and it helps hold sugar if I should decide to sprinkle some on the top crust.
So, I'm thinking what else can I put on the top -- looking in refer.

Hey! mayo it has eggs, oil and vinegar.  I remember somewhere that someone had suggested putting vinegar in pie crust (another one for the deep dark areas of my brain, I should clean it out might be more interesting tid bits).
So the rest of the story is I brushed the top crust with mayo, baked the pie the way I normally do.
It worked out great :) was easier to use, and no left over yolk.
Yes I will do this again.

name: Japanese Salad for 2 (Low Carb)
directions: Sauce.
mix together garlic, wasabi, soy sauce, miso, water, vinegar & Sugar - set aside.
tear your endive and bok choy leaves only into bite size pieces.
sliver snow peas and raidsh lengthwise.  Feel free to add any other crunchy vegetables such as cucumber or water chestnuts.
set aside.
Heat oil.
prepare tempura batter like thick pancake mix.
generously coat shirmp - fry in hot oil until nicely golden brown - remove from oil and let sit on paper towel while you plate the salad.
put salad in a pile or in a bowl.
place 3 shrimp on each pile.
remix sauce and spoon over salad and shrimp.
enjoy.

name: Edible Candy Cookie Turkey
directions: Take a Reeses Peanut butter cups and use about a dime sized dollop of icing to "glue" it to a chocolate wafer - make sure it's centered. Set aside.
Take 8 Nutter Butter cookies and on the top center of one of the cookies make a stripe of icing. Affix two chocolate chips as "eyes," a yellow or white "nose" and a red "mouth."  Set aside to dry.

Take Reeses/Wafers that you started with and around the edge where the Reeses cup meets the wafer, make a half circle of icing. Along that half circle, evenly space 5 candy corns, with the wide part of the candy corn facing outward. Let set for 5 minutes.
While the Reese/wafers are on the table laying flat, put a dollop of icing on the center of the Reeses cups and then take the Nutter Butters and glue them onto the Reeses. DO NOT LET SET.

Immediately, take a new chocolate wafer and lay it on the table. Put a large round dollop of icing in the center. Take the Reese, nutter/butter "body" of the turkey and place it on top of the icing. You might need to slide the Nutterbutter/reeses to get the right balance to make it stand up. Usually it stands up pretty easily.
Stick two orange "feet" at the base of the nutter butter.

name: Garam Masala
directions: Dry roast all spices in a heavy bottomed and completely dry pan or skillet over very low heat.
Stir the spices constantly.
Remove pan from fire as soon as you can smell the aroma of spices.
Dry grind small quantity of the spices into fine powder in an electric blender at a time.
Remove the cardamom pod skins from the powder.
Allow powder to cool.
Store in an air0tight container in a dark and cool place.
Use sparingly and remember to close the container lid tightly after every use.

name: Ashley's Amazing Tomato Soup
directions: Combine tomato sauce, brown sugar, and pesto.
Stir until hot.
Stir in 1-2 cups cream or milk, depending on how thick and creamy you desire your soup.
Enjoy!

name: La Boqueria Smoked Salmon Toasts
directions: Slice bread into 16 thin slices, drizzle with olive oil and toast in 400 F oven until crispy.
Spread crème onto toast points, add a small piece of smoked salmon, drizzle with honey and garnish with a sprig of dill.

name: La Boqueria Marinated Spanish Olives
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Marinade 30 minutes to 6 hours.
serve.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Spiced Nut Mix
directions: Combine nuts in a mixing bowl.
Beat egg whites in separate bowl till foamy.
Add remaining ingredients.
Coat nuts with egg white mixture.
Place on baking sheet.
Roast in 400°F oven till browned.
Let cool before serving.

name: Cheese Noodles
directions: Boil noodles in salted water 5-8 minutes; drain well.
Toss hot noodles with cheese and butter in a large bowl. Salt to taste and serve.

name: Toasted Sesame and Sausage Tapas
directions: Roast sausage in oven or however you prefer to cook your sausage.
Toast sesame seeds in fry pan for a couple of minutes, until lightly toasted.
Slice cooked sausages on bias.
Add sausage and pineapple sauce to sauce pan. Sausage is cooked therefore you are just heating sauce at this point.
Place in serving dish and add toothpicks to the top pieces.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

similar.name: Breading Mix for Frying - Low-Carb (Atkins) Version

name: Healthy Broccoli Salad
directions: Chop up broccoli into bite sizes.
Mix broccoli, onions, almonds and mozzarella in large bowl.
In separate bowl combine vinegar, sugar and mayo.
Pour over broccoli mixture and toss to coat.
Let chill in the fridge for a few hours.

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese

name: Hawaiian Salad
directions: Drain pineapple, reserving 1 tablespoon juice.
In a large bowl, combine greens, pineapple and cheese.
In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, sugar and reserved pineapple juice; mix well.
Pour over salad; toss to coat.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese

name: Must Make Mango Salsa
directions: I put everything into the food processor and pulse until fairly fine.
You can pulse it to your preference.
If you like it chunky, don't do it for too long.
if you like it soupy, go for it.
You can also do this manually with a knife and dice everything, but that's too much work.

name: Prosciutto Rolls
directions: Beat cheese and milk until spreadable.
Place prosciutto slices, overlapping slightly on plastic wrap to form an 10x18" rectangle.
Spread cheese mixture to cover.
Place a double row of peppers on long edge. Roll up.
Wrap in plastic wrap.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Cut into 1/2" bites.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Buddha's Herb Mix for Mushrooms
directions: Mix spices together and place in a resealabe jar.
Shake jar before using to ensure blending when measuring out.

name: Quick and Easy Salmon Cakes
directions: Add boiling water to stuffing mix and let stand 5 minutes.
Mix eggs and salmon
Add stuffing mix.
Shape into patties.
Cook about 5 minutes on each side until slightly browned.

name: Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)
directions: Combine peas, greens and scallions in a medium bowl.
Using the same skillet you cooked the bacon in, add back the diced bacon plus the water, vinegar and lemon juice and cook 1 to 2 minutes more.
Pour bacon dressing over salad, toss gently to coat. Season with black pepper and serve immediately. Yields 1 1/2 cups per serving.

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese

name: Poached Basa Fillets
directions: In large skillet vegetable stock and kitchen bouquet ;heat to boiling.
Add fillets and gently simmer for approximately 3 minutes.
Carefully turn fillets over and gently simmer for another 2 minutes.
Serve immediately.

name: Pineapple,cheese and Ham Dip
directions: mash the luncheon meat very well in a bowl.
put in the cream cheese softened.
mix everything well.
pour onto a platter very nicely.
top with the pineapple jelly.
serve with ritz crackers to dip into.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Cinnamon Sugar Toast - Simplified!
directions: Spread a bit of margarine on soda crackers.
Sprinkle sugar/cinnamon mix onto crackers.
Enjoy!

name: Fish Fillets With Herbed Butter
directions: Arrange fish in single layer in baking dish.
Mix lemon juice, melted butter and dried herbs; drizzle over fish.
Sprinkle with pepper and onion salt.
Bake uncovered for 8 - 10 minutes per 1 inch thickness of fillets.

name: Dip for Raw Vegetables
directions: Mix together and serve chilled as a dip for veggies.
I like to serve sliced peppers, carrots, celery, radishes, sliced cucumbers, speared zucchini, mushrooms.

similar.name: Very Fattening, but Very Yummy Dried Beef Dip
Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Bambinos
directions: Heat oven to 400°F.
Chop pepperoni and mix with sauce and cheese.
Spoon sauce mix on crackers or toasted rounds; sprinkle with oregano.
Bake on ungreased cookie sheet until cheese is melted, 3 - 5 minutes.

name: Spicy Spinach Burritos -- Don't Knock It 'til Ya Try It!!!
directions: Heat olive oil in saucepan, add garlic, peppers & salt (adjust salt to your taste, don't overdo as you can always add more & once there's too much you'll have to start over)- cook until garlic is golden in color (make sure you don't burn it).  Add spinach (I fill the pot so use as much as you can cram in there - it will wilt down & you definitely want enough), toss to coat & cover.  Simmer on low heat until spinach is mushy or tears easily with a fork, about 10 minutes.

Remove from heat & discard peppers, fill flour tortillas & wrap.  My honey heats the tortillas over an open flame first which gives a lovely flavor - if you can make some from scratch that's even better!  Enjoy!
I often make this as an appetizer but sometimes I make it just for me for lunch --   Delicous I tell you!  Even my spinach hating ex-husband loves this.

similar.name: Fast and Economical Quesadillas - Indian Style
Johnny Jalapeno's Sweet Heat Appetizers (Or Wraps)

name: Enchilada Chicken Soup
directions: In large saucepan, combine soups, milk, chicken, enchilada sauce & chilies.
Mix well.
Cook till heated through.
Garnish with sour cream.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Old School Cheese Ball
directions: Let all three cheeses get to room temperature.
With a blender, mix together all ingredients EXCEPT the nuts.
Shape into 1 or 2 balls (I always do 2 so that there are more nuts to go around).
Roll each cheese ball in nuts, place on a piece of waxed paper and put in the fridge to set up.
Serve with buttery crackers on the side.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer
Linda's Veggie and Cream Cheese Stuffed Celery

name: Linda's Fantabulous Food Processor Pie Crust
directions: Whiz flour and salt in processor a few times.
Add the frozen shortening and butter and whiz until you have pea sized lumps.
Mix water, vinegar and egg well and dump over the flour mixture all at once.  Whiz until the dough almost comes together.  If it forms a ball you went too far --
Dump the dough onto a sheet of waxed paper and divide in half.  Shape the dough into two flat disks, wrap in plastic and refrigerate for two hours or double wrap and freeze for up to three months.
Roll bottom crust to fit your pan.  Before filling or blind baking paint the bottom crust with a beaten egg white.  Trim the crust.
Fill the shell and continue with your recipe.
Roll the top crust.  Lay on top of filling, and flute the edge.
Mix the remaining egg white and yolk and 'paint' the top crust. For a fruit pie sprinkle sugar on top crust and for a savory add a drop or two of cream to the egg yolk and paint the top crust.
Continue with your recipe and bake according to the directions.

name: Artichoke Rose Garnish
directions: Slice stem from bottom of artichoke so it stands without wobbling.
Pull off any bottom leaves that have spread out from the globe.
Slice off the top of the artichoke, about 1 to 1-1/2 inches from the top.
Begin at the bottom of the artichoke. Using the larger petals for the bottom rows, place each rose petal with the stem side in between each artichoke leaf.
The thorns on the artichoke leaves should help secure the petals.

Work in a circular motion around the base, decreasing the petal size as you work toward the top. The smallest rose petals should be slightly folded and inserted straight into the cut top of the artichoke.
The artichoke rose should only take about 15 minutes to put together.
It is best made within a few hours of use.
Refrigerate until ready to use as an appetizer tray garnish or party table decoration.

name: Oriole Nectar
directions: Boil  water.
Mix in ordinary white granulated sugar.
Stir and allow the mixture to cool.
When the nectar is room temperature, fill your clean oriole feeder.
Tips: This is 6 parts water to 1 part sugar.
Never use dyes or food coloring, as they are not healthy for hummingbirds or orioles.
Never use honey when making your nectar mix. Honey attracts bees and can grow black fungus that will cause a fatal liver and tongue disease in hummingbirds.
Replace the nectar once every three to four days and clean the feeder thoroughly.
Unused nectar can be refrigerated for up to two weeks.
You will need to clean your feeder every few days, with hot water and a mild (10%) bleach solution to inhibit mold. Rinse thoroughly before refilling with water syrup.

name: Crunchy Oriental Salad
directions: Place coleslaw and onions in a large salad bowl.
Melt butter on the stove and then add the Ramen Noodles (broken up), almonds and sesame seeds and brown. Cool and drain on paper towels.
Combine the rest of the ingredients and the seasoning packet for the dressing. Pour dressing over salad when ready to serve. Toss to combine.

name: Central Market's Tootie Fruity Cosmos Strawberry Salad
directions: Toss the lettuce, feta, pecans and strawberries together in a large bowl.
Add dressing to your taste
Add in other types of fruit to experiment.
Amounts can be adjusted to your preference.

similar.name: Sweet and Tangy Balsamic Salad (With Honey Roasted Peanuts)

name: Chicken Burgers
directions: Mix everything together in a bowl.
Spray grill with non-stick cooking spray.
Shape into 4 patties.
Cook until both sides are golden brown.

name: Copycat Stove Top Stuffing Mix
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Bake bread 8 to 10 minutes, cool.
Dump all ingredients in a large bowl (that has a cover!) shake well to blend.
To Use: Combine 2 cups stuffing mix, 1/2 cup boiling water, 2 tablespoons melted butter in a saucepan.

name: Individual Pesto Feta Pita Pizza
directions: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Spread pesto on pita pocket.
Top with desired amount of tomato, basil (if using) and feta cheese.
Pop into oven for 5-10 minutes.
As easy as that!  Enjoy.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: 15 - Minute Easy Enchiladas
directions: Prepare a cookie sheet with foil, sprayed with Pam.
Heat (don't boil) the chili and beans.
Spoon mixture into tortillas, sprinkle with cheese and roll on a flat surface and place seam side down on prepared cookie sheet.
Repeat until all shells are filled, placing them side by side on the pan.
Top with remaining chili mix, spread to coat shells.
Top with cheese.
Bake just until cheese is melted.
Serve with sour cream.

similar.name: Fast and Economical Quesadillas - Indian Style

name: Accidental Onion Ring Sauce
directions: Add ingredients in any order and whisk together until taste and texture is uniform.
Experiment with ingredients to make it just the way you like!
Dip your onion rings in it!

name: Yummy Seasoned Fries
directions: Place potatoes n a foil lined baking sheet.
Bake at 450 for 8 minutes.
Combine remaining ingredients; sprinkle over potatoes and mix gently.
Bake 4-5 minutes longer or until the potatoes are browned and crisp.

name: Salmon Cakes - Rachael Ray
directions: Heat a medium skillet over medium high heat.
Combine salmon, egg white, bread crumbs, crab boil seasoning, hot sauce, parsley, roasted red pepper and salt and pepper.
Form 4 patties, 1-inch thick.
Add vegetable oil to hot pan, Rotate pan one complete turn to coat bottom of pan with the oil.
Add patties and cook about 3 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through.

name: Pecan Stuffed Deviled Eggs
directions: Cut eggs in half lengthwise and carefully remove yolks.
Mash yolks in a small bowl; stir in mayonnaise, onion, parsley, mustard, and salt.  Blend well.
Stir in pecans.
Spoon or pipe yolk mixture evenly into egg-white halves.
Garnish, if desired (paprika, fresh parsley, etc).

name: Quick Fix Avocado Salad
directions: Cut avocados in half and remove pit.
Peel flesh away and slice avocado into wedges.
Arrange slices on a serving plate.
Squeeze lime juice over avocado slices and then top with torn cilantro leaves.

similar.name: Salsa Poached Egg on Mixed Leaf Salad

name: Chicken Rub
directions: Add all ingredients and heat in a small sauce pan. When chicken is almost done, spread onto each side of chicken until cooked to taste.

similar.name: Vinegar Hot Sauce for Pulled Pork

name: Potato Gnocchi Courtesy of Bostonmarket.com
directions: Mix potatoes, egg yolks, seasonings, flour and 1/2 of the cheese.
On a floured surface, roll into 1 1/2 inch tubes and cut them into 1 1/2 inch long segments.
Put these in boiling, salted water.
When they float to the top, cook an additional 2 to 3 minutes.
Toss with hot tomato sauce, finishing with the remainder of the cheese.

name: Healthy Spicy Shrimp and Scallop Skewers
directions: Thaw any meat as necessary. If fresh, proceed to the next step.
Mix together the salt, pepper, cayenne, and garlic.
Align shrimp and scallops every other onto 4 skewers or 1 skewer per person.
Brush the shrimp with the olive oil. Use more if you would like a more bold and juicy flavor, but stick to minimal amounts if you would like a lower calorie meal.
Sprinkle the spice seasoning mix over each side of the skewers.
Squeeze the lemon juice over one side of the skewers.
Grill them over medium to medium-high heat until the meat is cooked through. About 2-3 minutes per side.
Add Tabasco sauce to your likening and garnish with some sliced grilled lemons.

name: Panko Tilapia
directions: On plate, mix flour and seasoning.
On second plate, place bread crumbs.
In bowl, beat egg with fork.
Coat fish with flour, dip into egg and coat well with bread crumbs.
In 10-inch nonstick skillet, heat 2 Tbsp of the oil over medium-high heat. Add 2 fish fillets and cook 3 minutes.
Carefully turn fish over. Reduce heat to medium and cook about 3 minutes longer or until fish flakes easily with fork.
Repeat for remaining 2 fillets.

similar.name: Breading Mix for Frying - Low-Carb (Atkins) Version

name: White Gravy
directions: In a heavy skillet over medium-high heat, melt butter.
Stir in flour until well blended.
Add milk, stirring well.
Reduce heat to a simmer and stir constantly for about 4-5 minutes until gravy is thick and bubbly.
Season with salt and pepper.
Serve warm.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Curried Chicken
directions: Place chicken, pineapple, water chestnuts, raisins and almonds in a medium-sized bowl and toss together.  Season with pepper.
In a screw-top jar, combine cream, lemon juice, soy sauce, and curry powder and shake vigorously.
Pour over chicken mixture and toss to coat.

name: Reduced Fat White Trash Dip
directions: Soften cream cheese.
Mince green onions, blend with cream cheese.
Spread into the bottom of a 9" pie plate.
Pour chili over top.
Top with shredded cheese.
Microwave for 5-8 minutes depending on microwave until cheesy is melted.
Serve with tortilla chips.

similar.name: Very Fattening, but Very Yummy Dried Beef Dip

name: Grilled Prosciutto Wrapped Scallops
directions: Rinse the scallops and then pat them dry with a paper towel.
Drizzle olive oil on one side of scallops.
Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and some fresh lemon juice.
Turn scallops over and repeat step 3.
Fold slice of prosciutto in half lengthwise and wrap around the each scallop.
Secure with a wooden skewer.
Place on grill set to high heat.
Cook on each side for about 4-5 minutes.

similar.name: Healthy Spicy Shrimp and Scallop Skewers

name: Broccoli Tuna Noodles
directions: Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain water.
Add tuna, soup, milk and brocolli to cooked noodles. Stir together and heat. Then add shredded cheese.
Continue to heat till cheese is melted.

name: Jerk Salmon With Apricot Glaze
directions: Heat oil in an oven proof skillet.
Season salmon fillet with jerk seasoning. Eyeball it because this stuff can get spicy and overpower the fish.
Salt to taste.
When pan is hot, place fish skin side down in skillet. Do not move.
About 3 minutes later depending on the thickness of the salmon, flip.
Move to oven preheated to 350 degrees.
While salmon is cooking heat 1 tbls preserves and 1tbls horseradish in microwave proof dish until it melts and stir.
Remove salmon from oven when done to your likeness.
Slather salmon with apricot mixture.
This recipe can easily be triple/quadrupled.

name: Apple Fruit Salad
directions: Mix all cut up fruits together.  Spoon into small bowls or custard cups.
Combine yogurt, orange juice, and cinnamon in small bowl.  Drizzle over fruit before serving.

similar.name: Sweet and Tangy Balsamic Salad (With Honey Roasted Peanuts)

name: Stacked Enchiladas Made Light
directions: Cook chicken and shred.
Heat enchilada sauce.
Heat black beans and corn.

Stack on oven proof plates, starting with tortilla, then chicken, bean/corn mixture, onion, sauce, cheese. Make two layers of each and heat in 350 degree oven for 5 minutes, or until cheese has melted (can be heated in microwave if you're worried about hot plates).
Top with additional onion and non-fat sour cream, if desired.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Salmon Croquettes With Horseradish Mayonnaise
directions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Combine 1/4 cup mayonnaise and next 4 ingredients (through egg) in a large bowl, stirring well.
Add salmon to mayonnaise mixture; toss to combine.
Process crackers in a food processor until finely ground.
Add 3 tablespoons cracker meal to salmon mixture; stir to combine.
Shape salmon into 4 patties.
Place remaining cracker meal in a shallow dish. Dredge patties in cracker meal.
Add patties to pan; cook 2 1/2 minutes on each side or until golden.
Combine 1/2 cup mayonnaise and remaining ingredients, stirring well. Serve with croquettes.

name: Quick and Easy Cream Sauce
directions: You can use a pan or a pot. I used a pot this time, but whenever I do shrimp or chicken I use a pan.
Add cream.
Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add basil, cheese, pepper and pepper flakes.
Pour sauce into a bowl; add pasta and toss well.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Instant Garlic Mashed Potatoes
directions: Boil water in a medium saucepan.
Meanwhile, mix potato flakes and garlic salt.
Add boiling water to potato flakes.
Stir in milk and margarine.
(NOTES: Adjust measurements except for garlic salt according to box directions. I like to use Idaho Spuds brand.).

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Crispy Deep Fried Spinach Balls
directions: Mix together all the ingredients in a bowl using your hands as this helps get the mix together, the egg white will help to bind the mixture so it should all come together very quickly.
Once the mix can be sculpted into a ball shape it is ready to create the individual balls.
Tear off sections of the mixture and using your palms roll it into a ball about the size of a golf ball flatten the ball slightly so it is a kind of oval shape.
Deep fry the balls until they are a golden brown colour on all sides and serve on top of a creamy pasta dish. The balls should be slighly soft with melted cheese inside if they are cooked correctly.

name: Seared Sun-Dried Tomato-Pesto Sea Scallops
directions: Place the sundried tomatoes and pesto sauce in food prossesor, and blend together.
Sprinkle salt and pepper on both sides of sea scallops to taste. Put clarrified butter in pan over med-hi heat, and sear scallops in butter for 3 minutes on each side.
Heat the sundried tomato pesto sauce over med heat until hot.
Serve scollops on plate with 1 teaspoon of hot sundried pesto sauce on top of each scallop.

similar.name: Healthy Spicy Shrimp and Scallop Skewers

name: Shake and Bake Crumb Mix
directions: Mix everything together.

name: Easy Ham-Wrapped Breadsticks Appetizer
directions: Spread ham slices evenly with cream cheese spread.
Wrap 1 ham slice around top half of each breadstick.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Green Goat Salad
directions: •	You can mix or layer it.
•	Add dressing right before you serve.

similar.name: Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)

name: Glazed Pecans
directions: Combine splenda & heavy cream in saucepan cook over medium heat, constantly stirring until mixture threads. Pour vanilla over pecans in a separate dish: sprinkle with salt. Let vanilla soak in while syrup cooks. Pour syrup over pecans and stir to coat. After cool, break up into individual pieces.

name: Four-Peppercorn Spice Butter
directions: Combine the above ingredients in a small bowl; mix well.
You may store the butter in a covered container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
Alternately, form it into a cylinder, wrap in wax or parchment paper, and freeze; slice rounds as needed.
Makes 1/4 pound seasoned butter.

similar.name: Flavored Butter: Garlic and Parsley Butter
Flavored Butter: Saffron and Cardamom Butter

name: Brandyberry's Salad
directions: Mix together: mayonnaise, Parmesan cheese, and sugar
In separate bowl mix all other ingredients together.
Just before serving combine the sauce with the salad mix.

similar.name: Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)

name: Simple Cranberry Stuffing
directions: Heat water, butter, and cranberries together until boiling.
Add Stuffing (and optional sage) and mix well.
Quickly add Italian style breadcrumbs (more for dryer stuffing, less for more moist stuffing) and stir well.

similar.name: Spring Mix With Walnuts, Cranberries and Goat Cheese

name: Layered Apple Dip
directions: Mix cream cheese and brown sugar, put in a dish.
Pour on ice cream topping.
Sprinkle toffee pieces over all.  May use Heath pieces.
Serve with slices of apple or any other fruit you choose.
The yield is a guess because I don't measure it   I put it in a pan about the size of a 9 x 13.

name: Teething Gel
directions: Add 1 drop of the clove oil at a time to the glycerin (you can also use vegetable oil, but it won't stick as well to the gums, and doesn't taste as sweet) and shake until mixed together.  Try it yourself before using it on the baby to make sure it isn't too strong.

name: Pineapple Cranberry Relish
directions: Wash cranberries, removing stems and soft berries.
Grind raw cranberries, add pineapple and sweetener.
This relish is tart, a good accompaniment to turkey or any other meat. It will keep well in the fridge for use with many meals. Remainder of package may be frozen in plastic bag.

name: Spiked Shrimp
directions: Pour oil in nonstick skillet and get it hot.
Put shrimp in pan.
Sprinkle seasoning all over shrimp while stirring.
Cook for about 3 minutes. Turn all shrimp over.
Let cook another 3-4 minutes till all pink is gone and shrimp are opaque.
Turn off Heat.
Let sit about 2 minutes and serve.

similar.name: George Foreman's Shrimp Al Mojo De Ajo
Healthy Spicy Shrimp and Scallop Skewers

name: Anne's Chile Con Queso
directions: Chop tomato, onion, and chilies.
Melt Cheeses together in a sauce pan over low heat.
Add cream to cheese, stirring constantly.
Add tomato, onion, chilies and garlic, stirring constantly to blend a little more cream may be needed, if so add a few drops at a time.
Serve warm with chips, crackers, etc.

name: Last-Minute Cranberry Relish
directions: Pour the cranberry sauce into a 4-cup(or larger)glass or ceramic bowl.
Drain the pineapple, and reserve the juice for another purpose.*optional*.
Add the pineapple to the cranberry sauce.
Add the nuts, apple-pie spice and cloves.
Stir well into mix.
Serve at once or refrigerate until ready to serve.

similar.name: Spring Mix With Walnuts, Cranberries and Goat Cheese

name: Low Fat Zesty Potato Topper
directions: Put everything into a food processor.
Pulse until well mixed and smooth.
If you want it more creamy, add sour cream a tablespoon at a time.
This makes a lot, but we keep it in the fridge for about a week and end up using it all.
Heats up in the microwave well too.

similar.name: Super Easy Ham Cheese Spread for Cracker Appetizer

name: Ahh Bologna!!!!
directions: Do not cut bologna to lie flat. Fry bologna until browned and "cupped".
Scoop large spoon of mashed potatoes in the "cup".
Lay slice of yellow cheese over top.
Bake in a 350 degree Fahrenheit oven for 5 to 10 minutes or heat in microwave for 1 minute.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Sugar-Free Sweet Cole Slaw
directions: Combine the coleslaw mix and onion in a large bowl.  Whisk together the salad dressing, vegetable oil, sugar substitute, vinegar, and salt in a medium bowl; blend thoroughly.  Pour dressing mixture over coleslaw mix and toss to coat.  Chill at least 2 hours before serving.

name: Reduced Fat Bisquick Mix (Whole Wheat)
directions: Mix together.
Cover tightly and store.
Use in Bisquick Reduced Fat recipes.

name: Korean Spicy Clam Soup With Noodles
directions: Boil salted water in large pot for pasta. Add pasta and cook al dente.
Meanwhile, in a separate 3 qt pot, mix clam juice, water, garlic, sesame oil, soy sauce, garlic chili sauce, sugar, salt, ancho chili powder and daikon radish over medium high heat.
When clam juice mixture reaches a boil, add in clams in shells. Cook until shells open. Discard any that don't open after about 3 minutes.
Add spinach and green onions and cook about 1 minute, or until spinach wilts.
Place cooked pasta in serving bowls and ladle soup with clams over pasta. Serve.

similar.name: Beef and Noodle Stuff (warning: Ultimate Lazy Food)

name: Chile 'n' Cheese Spirals
directions: Combine cream cheese, cheddar cheese, chilies, green onions, bell pepper and olives in medium bowl.
Spread 1/2 cup cheese mixture over each tortilla; roll up. Wrap each roll in plastic wrap; refrigerate for 1 hour.
Remove plastic wrap; slice each roll into six 3/4-inch pieces. Serve with salsa for dipping.

similar.name: Spicy Spinach Burritos -- Don't Knock It 'til Ya Try It!!!

name: Grilled Teriyaki Tuna
directions: In a large resealable plastic bag, combine the teriyaki sauce, oil, garlic, and pepper. Place the tuna fillets in the bag. Seal the bag with as little air in it as possible. Give the mix a good shake, to ensure the tuna fillets are well coated. Marinate for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
Meanwhile, preheat an outdoor grill for high heat, and lightly oil grate.
Remove tuna from marinade, and place on grill. For rare tuna, grill for 3 to 5 minutes on each side. For medium, grill 5 to 8 minutes per side. For well done, grill for 8 to 10 minutes per side.

name: Sour Cream Fettuccine
directions: Cook fettuccine until tender and drain.
Combine sour cream, whipping cream and butter in a saucepan.
Heat but do not boil.
Add Parmesan cheese and season to taste with salt & pepper.
pour sauce over fettuccine and toss.
sprinkle with additional cheese  and chopped parsley if desired.
Serve at once.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Pesto Brie Melts
directions: Slice baguette into 1/4" thick slices.
Top with a thin layer of pesto, sliced brie and top with a sun dried tomato.
heat in oven at 350 degrees for 7 minutes until brie is slightly melted.

similar.name: Fettuccine With Dried Tomatoes and Olives

name: Spinach Pasta Salad - Taste of Home
directions: In a large bowl, combine the first eight ingredients.
In a small bowl, whisk together dressing ingredients.
Pour dressing over salad and serve immediately.

similar.name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese

name: Cilantro Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender/food processor and puree until smooth.
Season with coarse salt and ground pepper.

name: Vinegar Hot Sauce for Pulled Pork
directions: Bring the water, salt, vinegar, hot sauce, pepper, oregano, brown sugar, dry rub, and garlic to a boil and stop the cooking.
Pull your pork and let it rest in the marinate.
Serve, with optional barbecue sauce.

name: Cheesy Herb and Turkey Bites
directions: Unfold each turkey slice so that it is flat.
Spread each slice with 1 teaspoons cheese and top with 1 teaspoons  bell pepper.
Carefully roll up.
Cut each roll into 4 pieces.
Place each turkey on bagel chips.
Garnish with parsley.

similar.name: Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)
Sweet and Tangy Balsamic Salad (With Honey Roasted Peanuts)

name: Dishwasher Detergent
directions: Mix altogether. Store in a plastic container with a lid.
Use 1 Tablespoon per load in the dishwashing cup in your dishwasher. You can use more if needed. Play around with the dosages. This is much cheaper than cascade for sure!

similar.name: All-Purpose Glass, Counter and Bathroom Cleaner Easier Mix

name: Gluten Free Play Dough
directions: Mix base ingredients in a large measuring pitcher.
Heat one cup of the resulting white mixture in a small saucepan. and add some food colouring (a few drops at a time) to reach the desired colour.
Stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, cook over low heat for about 5 minutes. Consistency will be very runny at first but once it starts to thicken mixture will firm up quite fast.
Remove from heat and knead to remove lumps (if any).
Repeat with rest of mixture. 1 cup of the mixture will yield approximately 1 small canister of Gluten-free Play Dough (like the standard sets with a few colours you buy in the store).
Given prep/cooking time is for one colour.

name: Spring Mix With Walnuts, Cranberries and Goat Cheese
directions: Rinse lettuces; divide between 2 bowls.
Sprinkle with walnuts, cranberries and goat cheese, evenly between the 2 bowls.
Dress with vinaigrette, to taste: Salt and Pepper, to taste.

similar.name: Sweet and Tangy Balsamic Salad (With Honey Roasted Peanuts)

name: Easy Pie Crust!
directions: Blend together the flour, sugar and salt.
Cut in cold butter flavor Crisco with pastry cutter until the mixture is evenly crumbly, and the pieces are the size of small peas.
Add the cold water and mix with hands just until the dough holds together.
Do not knead!  Pie dough will be tough the more you work it.
Roll out on floured board or table.
This will give you enough dough for 2 pie crusts.

similar.name: Linda's Fantabulous Food Processor Pie Crust

name: Bleu Cheese Walnut Toasts
directions: Mix ground walnuts with the crumbled bleu cheese to form a spread.
Spread on the bread.
Place the bead on a cookie sheet and broil until brown and bubbly.
WATCH carefully to avoid burning. (I have done it).

similar.name: Spring Mix With Walnuts, Cranberries and Goat Cheese

name: Manda's Salsa
directions: Combine onion, garlic, jalapeno and a little liquid from can of tomatoes in a food processor.  Chop until you get the texture you desire.
Pour above mixture into a bowl.
Chop up tomatoes next, then add to onion/garlic/jalapeno mixture.
Add all other ingredients and stir.
Add salt to taste, if needed.

name: Beer for Hair Volume
directions: Put some beer in a spray bottle.
Shampoo hair as usual and then towel dry lightly.
Spray hair with the beer and blow dry as usual.
This should give volume and the beer smell should go away when it dries.

name: Great Salmon Fillets
directions: Heat olive oil and butter over medium high heat.
Season fillets with spices and gently press down on fillets.
Place in skillet and cook 5 minutes till side, depending on thickness.
Let rest for 5 minutes and serve.

name: Yo-Naise (Light Mayonnaise)
directions: Mix together ingredients and use in your favorite recipes.

name: Sweet and Tangy Balsamic Salad (With Honey Roasted Peanuts)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a salad bowl, toss and enjoy!

similar.name: Central Market's Tootie Fruity Cosmos Strawberry Salad

name: Artichoke Seafood Dip
directions: combine first 4 ingredients.
microwave on high until mixture bubbles.
hollow out round loaf of bread, cubing and reserving removed bread for dipping.
pour dip into hollowed out loaf and serve.

name: Green Salad With Pepperoni and Cheese
directions: Cut pepperoni slice in half.  In a large salad bowl, combine the salad greens, tomatoes, cheese, bacon and pepperoni.
Serve with salad dressing.

similar.name: Greens With Warm Turkey Bacon Dressing (Ww)

name: Honey Vanilla White Tea Chai
directions: Warm milk, water, honey, and tea in the microwave for 2 minutes. Enjoy!

similar.name: Milk and Honey Soup - Cat Cora

name: Chocolate Truffles (Kangaroo Poo's)
directions: Mix the crushed biscuits, coconut + cocoa with condensed milk. Make sure they are all well combined.
Roll into balls about the size of a Walnut.
Roll into coconut and refrigerate until firm.

name: Chipotle Mayonnaise
directions: Mince chipotle chile to a paste with 1/2 teaspoon of adobo sauce.
In a bowl stir all ingredients together until combined well.
Sauce may be made 1 week ahead and chilled, covered.

name: Ginger Beer Pork Marinade
directions: Place pork in a glass baking dish and then pour ginger beer over pork.
